creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please resubmit, this time making sure to use tab delimiters 
instead of spaces (make(1) DOES care), and updating to use the new 
file structure for ports, as well as taking care to ensure that your 
patches don't get fudged.  Ideally, the resubmission should also take 
into account bsd.gnome.mk's existence, if applicable.  Thanks.
